prompt: Luxury fashion magazine cover, vertical portrait, featuring a poised young professional woman seated in a black leather office chair in a modern high-rise office. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair styled in a sleek high ponytail with soft side bangs, and wears a fitted ribbed short-sleeve knit top in {argument name="top color" default="deep burgundy"}, a high-waisted pleated midi skirt in taupe-brown, and a delicate silver necklace with small key-like layered pendants. She sits with legs crossed, holding a slim tablet across her lap, looking calm, composed, and quietly powerful. The setting is a polished executive office with a wooden wall panel on the right, floor-to-ceiling glass behind her, a blurred meeting scene with 2 indistinct businesspeople visible through the glass on the left, and a desk edge in the lower left corner with an open laptop and stacked documents. Soft natural daylight, refined editorial styling, realistic fashion photography, warm neutral tones, subtle background blur, premium magazine aesthetic. Overlay elegant magazine typography: giant serif masthead reading {argument name="magazine title" default="OFFICIELLE"} across the top in ivory white, small subtitle below the left side reading "STYLE. CONFIDENCE. CAREER.", date at top right reading {argument name="cover date" default="MAY 2024"}. Add 5 cover lines total: left upper "DESK to DESTINY" with smaller subtext "Elevating everyday workwear with intent and ease.", left middle "POWER IN POISE" with smaller subtext "Refined staples and modern silhouettes for the woman who leads.", right middle "FOCUS & FLOW" with smaller subtext "Thoughtful style that keeps you confident from morning to night.", large bottom-left headline "MODERN ELEGANCE" with italic subheading "Polished looks. Purposeful days." and small text "Timeless style for the new generation of professionals.", and a circular badge at lower right containing "WORKWEAR EDIT" and smaller text "Burgundy tones, warm neutrals, effortless confidence." Clean balanced layout, upscale women’s fashion magazine cover, confident office-as-runway mood, highly realistic, sophisticated, cinematic softness.
translatedPrompt: 奢华时尚杂志封面，竖版肖像，主角是一位沉稳干练的年轻职业女性，坐在现代高层办公室的黑色皮质办公椅上。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 的头发，梳成利落的高马尾，配有柔和的侧分刘海；身穿 {argument name="top color" default="深酒红色"} 的修身罗纹短袖针织上衣，搭配灰褐色高腰百褶中长裙，佩戴一条精致的银色项链，带有小型钥匙状的叠层吊坠。她双腿交叠而坐，膝上横放着一台轻薄平板电脑，神情冷静、从容且充满内敛的力量感。背景是精致的高管办公室，右侧为木质墙板，身后是落地玻璃，左侧玻璃后可见模糊的会议场景及 2 位轮廓不清的商务人士，左下角为办公桌边缘，放着打开的笔记本电脑和堆叠的文件。柔和的自然光，精致的编辑风格，写实时尚摄影，温暖的中性色调，细腻的背景虚化，高级杂志美学。叠加优雅的杂志排版：顶部为巨大的衬线字体刊头，写着 {argument name="magazine title" default="OFFICIELLE"}，呈象牙白色；左下方有小型副标题，写着 "STYLE. CONFIDENCE. CAREER."；右上角为日期，写着 {argument name="cover date" default="2024 年 5 月"}。总共添加 5 条封面标题：左上方 "DESK to DESTINY"，配以较小的副标题 "Elevating everyday workwear with intent and ease."；左中部 "POWER IN POISE"，配以较小的副标题 "Refined staples and modern silhouettes for the woman who leads."；右中部 "FOCUS & FLOW"，配以较小的副标题 "Thoughtful style that keeps you confident from morning to night."；左下角大标题 "MODERN ELEGANCE"，配以斜体副标题 "Polished looks. Purposeful days." 以及小字 "Timeless style for the new generation of professionals."；右下角有一个圆形徽章，内含 "WORKWEAR EDIT" 及较小的文字 "Burgundy tones, warm neutrals, effortless confidence."。布局整洁平衡，高端女性时尚杂志封面，职场如秀场般的自信氛围，高度写实，精致，电影感柔光。

breakdown.creativeCore: 职场时尚杂志封面：此提示词可生成一张精致的编辑类杂志封面肖像，展示了一位在现代办公室中的时尚职场女性，非常适合时尚、品牌推广及职场服饰宣传视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
